description: The Swarm orbit counter auxiliary data file provides precise Swarm orbit number information. The start of an orbit is defined as the Equator crossing of the ascending node (i.e. the northbound Equator crossing).
details:
Field name Type Unit Contents
orbit integer - Orbit number
MJD2000 real MJD2000 Orbit start date/time in MJD2000
date string - Orbit start date
UT string UTC Orbit start time
phi_AN real deg Longitude of orbit start
Source integer - Source of orbit number information Values:
Best quality = 0
Reduced quality = 1
